heading: Short title
label: 2991 Short title
text: This subchapter may be cited as the “Native American Programs Act of 1974”.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2991, , as added . , ; amended , , ; , , , related to Congressional statement of purpose, prior to repeal by , , . See .Pub. L. 88–452, title VIII, § 801Pub. Short Title of 2019 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–101, § 1133 Stat. 3261Dec. 20, 2019“This Act [amending sections 2991b–3 and 2992d of this title] may be cited as the ‘Esther Martinez Native American Languages Programs Reauthorization Act’.”

Short Title of 2006 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–394, § 1120 Stat. 2705Dec. 14, 2006“This Act [amending sections 2991b–3, 2992c, and 2992d of this title] may be cited as the ‘Esther Martinez Native American Languages Preservation Act of 2006’.”

L. 102–375, title VIII, § 821106 Stat. 1295Sept. 30, 1992“This subtitle [subtitle C (§§ 821, 822) of title VIII of , enacting sections 2991b–2, 2991c, 2992–1, 2992a–1, and 2992b of this title, amending sections 2991a to 2991b–1, 2991d to 2992, 2992c, and 2992d of this title, and repealing former sections 2991c and 2992b of this title] may be cited as the ‘Native American Programs Act Amendments of 1992’.”Pub.
